description:
The quiz assesses practical knowledge of AWS storage services, testing familiarity with S3, DynamoDB, Aurora, RDS, ElastiCache, best‑practice patterns, and common pitfalls. It is moderately challenging, using an engaging, informal tone that encourages learners to explore and solidify their cloud expertise.
Topics: Amazon S3, Amazon DynamoDB, Amazon Aurora, Amazon RDS, Amazon ElastiCache, AWS storage best practices, Common AWS storage gotchas
Audience: Developers, cloud engineers, and IT professionals with basic to intermediate experience in AWS who want to validate and deepen their understanding of AWS storage solutions.
